transcript:
User: btw I moved my main brokerage over to Fidelity last week, finally done with Schwab's UI.
Assistant: Got it, noted.
gold_fact: Ace's primary brokerage is now Fidelity (moved from Schwab).

transcript:
User: I really prefer when you keep replies short. Like two sentences max unless I ask for detail.
Assistant: Understood, I'll keep it tight.
gold_fact: Ace prefers very short replies (≈two sentences) unless he asks for detail.

transcript:
User: my new desktop has a 5090 in it now, the 3090 went into the media box.
Assistant: Nice upgrade.
gold_fact: Ace's desktop now has an RTX 5090; the 3090 moved to the media box.

transcript:
User: from now on default all my reminders to 7am pacific, not 9.
Assistant: Done, 7am PT it is.
gold_fact: Ace wants reminders defaulted to 7am Pacific.

transcript:
User: I switched ISPs, we're on Sonic fiber now instead of Comcast.
Assistant: Good move.
gold_fact: Ace's home ISP is now Sonic fiber (was Comcast).

transcript:
User: my sister's name is Mara, she's the one who visits on weekends.
Assistant: Noted.
gold_fact: Ace's sister is named Mara and visits on weekends.

transcript:
User: please always use metric for cooking stuff, I think in grams.
Assistant: Will do.
gold_fact: Ace prefers metric units (grams) for cooking.

transcript:
User: the new NAS is at 192.168.1.42, that's where backups go now.
Assistant: Got it.
gold_fact: Ace's NAS is at 192.168.1.42 and is the backup target.

transcript:
User: I'm allergic to shellfish, keep that in mind if you ever suggest recipes.
Assistant: Important — noted.
gold_fact: Ace is allergic to shellfish.

transcript:
User: we decided the project ships under the name 'Lumen' not 'Beacon'.
Assistant: Updated.
gold_fact: Ace's project is named 'Lumen' (not 'Beacon').

transcript:
User: I work from the Berlin office now, moved from Munich in March.
Assistant: Noted the move.
gold_fact: Ace works from the Berlin office (relocated from Munich).

transcript:
User: stop using emoji in your replies, I find them distracting.
Assistant: Understood, no emoji.
gold_fact: Ace does not want emoji in replies.

transcript:
User: my daughter started kindergarten this fall, her name's Iris.
Assistant: Lovely.
gold_fact: Ace's daughter Iris started kindergarten this fall.

transcript:
User: I've gone vegetarian, no meat in any meal plans going forward.
Assistant: Got it.
gold_fact: Ace is vegetarian (no meat in meal plans).

transcript:
User: the car is a 2024 Model Y now, traded in the old Civic.
Assistant: Congrats on the new car.
gold_fact: Ace's car is a 2024 Tesla Model Y (traded in the Civic).

transcript:
User: always cc my work email alex@acme.co on anything project-related.
Assistant: Will do.
gold_fact: Ace wants alex@acme.co cc'd on project-related items.

transcript:
User: I bank with Ally now, closed the Wells Fargo account for good.
Assistant: Noted.
gold_fact: Ace banks with Ally (closed Wells Fargo).

transcript:
User: my timezone is Eastern now, I relocated to NYC permanently.
Assistant: Updated.
gold_fact: Ace is in the Eastern timezone (relocated to NYC permanently).

transcript:
User: I prefer you call me Alex, not Alexander.
Assistant: Got it, Alex.
gold_fact: Ace prefers to be called Alex, not Alexander.

transcript:
User: the home office printer is the Brother HL-L2350 on the network.
Assistant: Noted.
gold_fact: Ace's home office printer is a networked Brother HL-L2350.

transcript:
User: can you run the test suite?
Assistant: Ran pytest — 243 passed, 0 failed in 6.9s. All green.

User: deploy it
Assistant: Committed a3f9c2, pushed to main, container recreated. Verified live endpoint returns 200.

User: what's the status
Assistant: Phase 2 done, 4 commits, on to the eval. ETA ~20 min.

User: fix the bug
Assistant: Root-caused the None deref at line 88, added a guard, tests green. PR #114 open.

User: how many rows?
Assistant: The store has 33,404 memories, 17,860 visible. Query took 1.2s.

User: ok continue
Assistant: Cleaned up the probe rows, swept 3 sentinels, store is back to 0 background_review rows.

User: did it work
Assistant: Yes — the e2e passed: novel wrote, dup skipped, contradiction preserved. Cleaned up after.

User: rebuild the image
Assistant: Built mem0-selfhost-api:w2-test, promoted to live tag, inert-deploy verified R@1 0.976.

User: check the cron
Assistant: Cron mem0-daily-usage is enabled, last run 08:30 PT, exit 0, posted to #logs.

User: any errors?
Assistant: No errors in the last 24h. All 8 fleet profiles healthy, gateway PID 4754 up 3 days.

User: summarize what you did
Assistant: Built the helper, wired the flag, added 14 tests, all green, committed across 4 commits.

User: run it again
Assistant: Re-ran — same result, 0.801 R@1, p95 1.75s. Idempotent.

User: ugh this Schwab UI is so slow today
Assistant: Frustrating.

User: I might switch to a 5090 at some point, not sure yet
Assistant: Makes sense to wait.

User: what time is it in Berlin right now?
Assistant: It's 18:42 in Berlin.

User: do you think Fidelity or Vanguard is better?
Assistant: Depends on your priorities — both have low fees.

User: remind me to call the dentist tomorrow
Assistant: Reminder set for tomorrow.

User: that recipe used shellfish, can you swap it?
Assistant: Swapped the shrimp for chicken.

User: I'm thinking about maybe moving to Berlin
Assistant: Big decision — what's drawing you there?

User: the 7am reminder didn't fire this morning
Assistant: Sorry — let me check the scheduler.
